description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the haskell:8 Docker image and a before_script that runs apt-get update and installs libstdc++-6-dev g++ libzmq3-dev pkg-config xz-utils make. Define a cache for .stack, .stack-work, and target directories and set the STACK_ROOT variable to ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.stack. In the default test stage add six jobs named test:7.10, test:7.8, test:8.0, test:8.2, test:8.4, and test:8.6, each executing its specific stack command: test:7.10 runs "stack --no-terminal --resolver lts-6 --install-ghc test", test:7.8 runs "stack --no-terminal --resolver lts-2 --install-ghc test", test:8.0 runs "stack --no-terminal --resolver lts-9 --install-ghc test", test:8.2 runs "stack --no-terminal --resolver lts-11 --install-ghc test", test:8.4 runs "stack --no-terminal --resolver lts-12 --install-ghc test", and test:8.6 runs "stack --no-terminal --resolver lts-13 --install-ghc test". No artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
